description.ko: 자연과 빛이 생존을 위한 리드미컬하고 유동적인 춤으로 어우러지는 생물학적 폐 구조의 거시적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A macroscopic exploration of a biological lung-like structure where nature and light merge into a rhythmic, liquid dance of survival.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, depicting a pulsating, semi-transparent respiratory organism woven from #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D vascular membranes. The entity drifts within a silent, #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid void, rhythmically exhaling #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores that swirl like liquid silk. Macro focus on the interconnected capillary networks and undulating fluid membranes. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, capturing a divine and serene natural atmosphere.
